---
name: Cleanup-only Work
about: Propose non-functional cleanup, refactoring, or technical debt reduction.
title: '[CLEANUP] '
labels: cleanup
---

## Context
Why is this cleanup needed now? Describe the technical debt or inconsistency being addressed.

## Scope of Work
List the specific files, components, or modules targeted for cleanup.

## Expected Outcome
How will this change improve the developer experience or system maintainability? (e.g., "Reduced boilerplate in store definitions").

## Implementation Notes
- Proposed refactoring pattern
- Known dependencies or risks

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No regression in functional behavior verified
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Stale code or comments removed
